name: FALLOPIAN TUBE CANCER

demographics.Path: tumor produces large amount of serous secretions → painful distension of fallopian tube

dominant_finding: multilocular cystic mass with spoke-wheel appearance
discriminating_features: fluid-filled tubular adnexal structure containing nodular / papillary solid components
multilocular cystic mass with spoke-wheel appearance
low vascular impedance (= resistive index of 0.29-0.40) in solid component on Doppler

general: fluid-filled tubular adnexal structure containing nodular / papillary solid components
multilocular cystic mass with spoke-wheel appearance
low vascular impedance (= resistive index of 0.29-0.40) in solid component on Doppler
increased adnexal metabolic activity on PET
